nasb.text: Thus says the Lord God, “Woe to the foolish prophets who are following their own spirit and have seen nothing.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord God, Woe to the foolish prophets who follow their own spirit, and have seen nothing!

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說：“愚頑的先知有禍了，他們只是隨從自己的靈說預言，卻沒有看見過甚麼異象。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说，愚顽的先知有祸了！他们没有看到异象，却私自发预言。
